title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Today is Sunday, so I'm going to reflect on my week.
I'm going to be real here and say I'm already off to a bad start because I'm filming this late at night.

title: will / shall
examples: Even though I'll still be working hard, I want to try my best to take care of my health as well.
So I'm already failing one of my goals, but I'll make up for it tomorrow.

title: have to / must
examples: I do have to give myself a little bit of credit, though.
